item.title: Minivan Drivers and Dealer Reactions
item.description: A look at why this group gets every dealer talking, with a focus on car buying and buyer protection. What stands out most to dealers?

media:content.media:title: Minivan Drivers and Dealer Reactions
media:content.media:description: A look at why this group gets every dealer talking, with a focus on car buying and buyer protection. What stands out most to dealers?

item.title: Used Car Warning That Could Save You Thousands
item.description: A quick check now can keep the dealer from getting the first move. Learn how to spot dealer fees and protect your budget when buying a used car. What should you check before you visit the dealership?

media:content.media:title: Used Car Warning That Could Save You Thousands
media:content.media:description: A quick check now can keep the dealer from getting the first move. Learn how to spot dealer fees and protect your budget when buying a used car. What should you check before you visit the dealership?

item.title: Hidden Fees to Watch Before You Sign
item.description: Know what they’re hiding so you don’t get trapped at the desk. Learn what to watch for in the finance office and how hidden fees can affect your car deal. What should buyers check before signing?

media:content.media:title: Hidden Fees to Watch Before You Sign
media:content.media:description: Know what they’re hiding so you don’t get trapped at the desk. Learn what to watch for in the finance office and how hidden fees can affect your car deal. What should buyers check before signing?

item.title: $10,000 Cars Worth Buying Right Now
item.description: A look at cars worth considering at the $10,000 price point, with a focus on real-world value and practical buying decisions. Which options stand out for your budget?

media:content.media:title: $10,000 Cars Worth Buying Right Now
media:content.media:description: A look at cars worth considering at the $10,000 price point, with a focus on real-world value and practical buying decisions. Which options stand out for your budget?

item.title: The Part Most Buyers Never See Until It’s Too Late
item.description: A look at the hidden side of car buying that many shoppers miss until it becomes a costly surprise. What should buyers check before making a trade-in or used car deal?

media:content.media:title: The Part Most Buyers Never See Until It’s Too Late
media:content.media:description: A look at the hidden side of car buying that many shoppers miss until it becomes a costly surprise. What should buyers check before making a trade-in or used car deal?
